rulings.Case Title: CONARD HOUSE, INC. VS. CRISTOL ZOBEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 19, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you personally appear for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with the tentative ruling in additions to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment. Hearing required. = (501/CFH)
